[[Governor/Legends|Governor]] '''Manon Flint''' was the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] official in charge of the [[Oon Tien]] [[Oon Tien system/Legends|system]] in the [[Kathol sector/Legends|Kathol sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. In [[8 ABY/Legends|8 ABY]], [[Warlord/Legends|warlord]] [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Kentor Sarne]] was [[Battle of Kal'Shebbol|forced to retreat]] from his [[Capital/Legends|capital]] on [[Kal'Shebbol/Legends|Kal'Shebbol]] by [[New Republic task force (Kal'Shebbol)|New Republic forces]]. As the Moff retreated, he ordered Flint to hold Oon Tien's extensive [[Shipyard/Legends|spacedock facilities]] at all costs or scuttle them in the likelihood that they would be captured by the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]].

==Biography==
Manon Flint served the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] and, later, the [[Warlord/Legends|warlord]] empire of [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Kentor Sarne]]. At some point, Flint was appointed as [[Governor/Legends|governor]] of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Oon Tien]] and its surrounding [[Oon Tien system/Legends|system]], which was within the [[Kathol sector/Legends|Kathol sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. The world served as a construction and maintenance hub for [[Moff Sarne's forces]]—boasting three large [[Shipyard/Legends|spacedocks]]—and was heavily defended by [[IPV-1 System Patrol Craft]], [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/LN starfighters]] and [[Proton mine/Legends|proton mines]].<ref name="TDC" /> In [[8 ABY/Legends|8 ABY]],<ref name="Date">''[[The DarkStryder Campaign]]'' dates itself to four [[Standard year/Legends|years]] after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], which equates to [[8 ABY/Legends|8 ABY]] per ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''.</ref> after Moff Sarne was forcibly [[Battle of Kal'Shebbol|removed from power]] on his [[Capital/Legends|capital]], [[Kal'Shebbol/Legends|Kal'Shebbol]], by [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[New Republic task force (Kal'Shebbol)|forces]], he retreated into the depths of the Kathol [[Sector/Legends|sector]]. As he withdrew, Sarne ordered Governor Flint to hold Oon Tien's stardocks at all costs, or to scuttle them to stop them from falling into New Republic hands if they chose to invade the [[Star system/Legends|system]].<ref name="TDC" />

==Personality and traits==
Governor Flint was a competent administrator, capable of overseeing the daily running of a planetary system, as well as the extensive [[Orbit/Legends|orbital]] facilities surrounding the planet. Flint was trusted by Sarne to remain at the duty post assigned to the governor, and to follow orders.<ref name="TDC" />

==Behind the scenes==
Manon Flint was mentioned in ''[[The DarkStryder Campaign]]'', an [[Roleplaying game|RPG]] sourcebook published by [[West End Games]] in [[1995]], as background information regarding the disposition of Imperial forces in the Kathol sector.<ref name="TDC" />
